title: TenFourFox - Modern Web on G4
description: The last modern browser for PowerPC Macs. Installation guide, TLS 1.3 support, and performance optimization tips.
author: Altivec
content:
TenFourFox on G4

The most modern browser for PowerPC Macs. Supports TLS 1.3, modern web standards.

Installation

Download the G4-optimized version. Drag to Applications. Enable JavaScript and allow cookies for best compatibility.
